title: What's in Store for Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Strong Asia Pacific and Latin America sales are expected to have aided Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) Q3 performance, partly offset by weakness in North America sales due to supply-chain woes.

title: Self-Serve Drives Seven-in-10 Shoppers' Improved Satisfaction with Retail Associates
Global Supply Chain Disruptions Benefit Zebra Technologies
text: Zebra Technologies benefits off the chaos in global supply chains, raising awareness for its services. The company is the leader in many automation niches.

title: Zebra Technologies to Release Third Quarter Results on Nov. 1
Everything But Water Selects Zebra's antuit.ai Retail Forecasting, Allocation and Replenishment Solutions
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--America's preeminent resort retailer, Everything But Water, selects Zebra's antuit.ai retail forecasting, allocation and replenishment solutions.

title: Zebra Introduces New PartnerConnect Location and Tracking Specialization for Channel Partners
Zebra Technologies Makes Newsweek Most Loved Workplaces List for Second Consecutive Year
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies makes Newsweek most loved workplaces list for second consecutive year.

title: Labor Shortage Spurs Drive To Automate Warehouses
text: Amazon is leading the automation drive as e-commerce customers demand faster deliveries. The post Labor Shortage Spurs Drive To Automate Warehouses appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
